title: Raise governance coverage to at least 85 percent

sources.reason: Add focused tests for currently under-covered governance decision branches.
The quality target defines the existing overall and critical coverage gates.
Coverage configuration defines the repository test measurement behavior.

riskAssessment.reason: Test-only changes reduce behavior risk; the existing quality and critical coverage gates remain required.

executionDecision.reason: The target, test-only scope, and verification commands are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Replace with task-specific review focus, or clear when no special review focus remains.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Focused tests cover additional failure and decision branches in governance modules without changing production behavior.
The measured total coverage is at least 85 percent and all existing critical coverage floors pass.
The full repository quality gate and AI governance checks pass, with results recorded in the archived Summary.
The approved remediation design and execution plan are included in the PR for the remaining two follow-up work items.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The latest review reports total governance coverage below the stated approximately 85 percent target.
constraints: Prefer focused failure-path tests over production refactoring.
Do not lower coverage floors or weaken quality gates.
intent.rationale: Closing the remaining coverage gap on decision-heavy governance paths improves confidence without increasing runtime behavior or repository complexity.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
